name: Nemesis
subtitle: Full Correspondences
flowText: Nemesis embodies balance, justice, retribution — under Saturn · Venus; in Libra.

related.name: Ma’at
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ♀ Venus
related.teaser: Venus is the rose of harmony — magnetic union, pulse of beauty, lover’s path.

related.name: XI. Justice
related.teaser: Justice is the shining scale of truth, sword of balance cutting illusion from the real.

related.name: ♄ Saturn
related.teaser: Saturn is the black mountain — the ring of time, stern father, weight of law.

related.name: Idunn
related.teaser: Idunn embodies poetry, music, craft — under Mercury; in Gemini, Pisces.

related.name: Benzaiten
related.teaser: Benzaiten embodies poetry, music, craft — under Mercury; in Gemini, Pisces.

related.name: Saraswati
related.teaser: Saraswati embodies wisdom, craft, strategy — under Mercury · Jupiter; in Aquarius, Libra.

related.name: Thoth
related.teaser: Thoth embodies wisdom, craft, strategy — under Mercury · Jupiter; in Aquarius, Libra.

related.name: Minerva
related.teaser: Minerva embodies wisdom, craft, strategy — under Mercury · Jupiter; in Aquarius, Libra.

related.name: Mokosh
related.teaser: Mokosh embodies creation, cosmic order — under Sun · Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.
